target_text: Ohh, understand. We call this [musical chords].
Good. What is next action, question?
Tank Four still have live Taumoeba. Tank Five and higher all dead.
Why would ship have name, question?
It healing. This come from inside me, question?
Understand. Radio if problem. Can help with my ship hull robot if you need.
I am very very very happy
You hear light from space, question? You hear stars, planets, asteroids, question?
You tell me humans need to sleep eight hours every sixteen hours. You no sleep for thirty-one hours. You sleep now.
I keep thinking about it. The theories are pretty hard to dispute. Some ancestor of Astrophage seeded Earth and Erid with life billions of years ago.
You have idea already. Not question. I know you. You have idea already. Tell idea.
Yes. Much honoring! Human and Eridian work together, save everyone!
Grace go out on hull to retrieve collector? No fun at all.
You air is okay, question? No power, no life support. Humans turn oxygen into carbon dioxide. You will use all oxygen and become harmed, question?
Punch, punch, punch, punch, punch, punch.
Good. Take out and give to me.
Amaze, amaze, amaze. Rocky breeder tank design.
Geology creates methane. Carbon dioxide plus minerals plus water plus heat makes methane.
What? What Grace see? What Grace see, question?
Rocky watch crew die. Could not fix. Grace say Grace will die. Rocky fix.
I clean and sterilize. Remove all Taumoeba. I make tiny fuel tank with my Astrophage. Seal generator airtight. Give back to you. You hook up to ship. Power restored.
Smart enough to identify threat or prey in time to act.
Is private. I sleep after eat. You watch me sleep, question?
Device keeps me alive in small room. Wait.
Good good good room! Want to understand all!
Yes. Six redundant Taumoeba-82.5 colonies, each in separate tanks with separate life-support systems. Each with Threeworld simulated atmosphere. Your farms are functioning, question?
You damage self to save me. Thank.
No, Grace, bad idea, come inside.
Life is also reason for population discrepancy! Life is reason!
Obvious I can do that! You are stupid right now. You sleep. I watch and also design replacement tank. Agree, question?
Probably not. Why so fast, question?
Question make no sense. Of course time is same. Time is same everywhere.
Exact same gases in each test. Same pressure. Same temperature. Same death ‘radiation’ from space. Same light from nearby star. Same same same.
Ship no touch air. Why is ship hot, question?
I make new engine. Taumoeba turn Astrophage into methane. React with oxygen. Make fire. Make thrust. Get to my ship. Much Astrophage there.
Situation bad. Threeworld air is eight percent nitrogen.
Average is six hundred eighty-nine years.
Yes. Always Earth units. You are bad at math, so always Earth units.
But if I were to give you something?
Not all Eridians willing to die for others.
I not know. Ship move. Sudden.
Hey, your face is leaking! I haven’t seen that in a long-ass time! Remind me—does that mean you’re happy or sad? ’Cause it can mean either one, right?
Flaw in counting, question? How you count, question?
I have Astrophage on my side of partition. Approximately two hundred sixteen grams remaining.
Grumpy. Angry. Stupid. How long since last sleep, question?
Good. Proud. I am scary space monster. You are leaky space blob. Check tanks!
Very good! We will need many many many chain links. More molds means I can make more at one time. You can make many molds, question?
Oh. Are you feeling it now?
Rocky has built predator collector, Rocky chain spooled and ready, Grace pilot training, not as good. What think, Earth?
Yes. Together. You have device to sample Astrophage, question?
Understand. Now I ‘see’ what you see.
Hull bending in big room below bedroom.
Understand. Not good. But not bad. Other five are clean, question?

Astrophage probably have carbon dioxide inside. Or decomposition creates carbon dioxide. Some percentage died in fuel tanks over time. Not all cells are perfect. Defects. Mutations. Some die. Those dead Astrophage put carbon dioxide in tanks.
No like. Alternate plan: Wait eleven days. Get to my ship. Clean out you ship fuel tanks. Sterilize—make sure no Taumoeba. Refill with fuel from my ship. Then can use all functions of you ship again.
No. Grace say Grace go home.
When winch get to link two hundred sixteen, you increase speed.
Grace very bad at make model.
We stay with Earth units or you get confused. How long is Earth day, question? And how many Earth days is one Earth year, question?
Everyone sick. I alone to run ship. More strange things happen. Engines not work right. I am engine expert. I cannot figure out problem.
That is why your ship rotates, question?
Yes yes yes. But this is moment. Important moment.
I am happy. You no die. Let’s save planets!
I go to lab to see device that store Adrian life. I made device now to collect sample from inside and not let you air in. Put you vacuum chamber in this. Close this. This make Adrian air inside.
Rocky not know. Only Rocky not died. Rocky could not fix.
We go Petrova line, we collect Astrophage, we study it, we go home, we save Earth!
Good good. I make sure my people take good care of you. They will make Astrophage maybe for you to go home!
We can find. Easy. Use Petrovascope.
Rocky will build workshop here. Will need much room for Rocky and much less room for Grace.
Why did other humans on you ship die, question?
You certain you can see light so small, question?

Theory: Many Astrophage in tanks. Some probably dead. Dead Astrophage have water. Dead Astrophage not immune to heat. Water and much much heat become hydrogen and oxygen. Oxygen and heat and hull becomes burn marks.
Hello Earth! I am Rocky. I am Rocky from Erid, I am not Rocky from movie, no no no no.
How Taumoeba get into fuel, question?!
Unknown. Mate possibly has new mate. I gone a long time.
You fuel tanks are big. You have enough nitrogen, question? I can give ammonia from Blip-A life support if you need.
Earth culture. You find. You name. What is name of predator, question?
Eridian name for my star is ♫♩♪♪♪.
No. Orbit decay soon. Then we die.
Name is [long string of musical chords].
Think we’ll find more of them? Intelligent species?
I do hear much higher frequency and much lower frequency.

Has to be, or you and I would not meet. If planet has less science, it no can make spaceship. If planet has more science it can understand and destroy Astrophage without leaving their system. Eridian and human science both in special range: Can make ship, but can’t solve Astrophage problem.
Maybe you can concentrate on Taumoeba.
Now you make exact Venus atmosphere in one tank and do detailed tests on Taumoeba-35, question?
Relief! I try so long. So many times. Fail. Much time here. Much time alone.
Possible. Another similarity: You and me both willing to die for our people. Why, question? Evolution hate death.
How many humans on Grace ship, question?
I just heard from the Astronomy hive. They have news!
You not know where you ship parts are, question?!
Need human word for Rocky mate.
Device not malfunction. Device broke. Fell off ship during trip. Device gone.
Why is a school teacher in space, question?
Why not you tell them yourself when you return home, question?
I make door. You close door.
Yes. Have liquid and liquid. Mix. They become xenonite.
That is sound of predator approaching you. That is sound of prey running away. Sound of object touching object very important. Evolve to hear.
Then we work. We work now! Learn how to kill Astrophage. You return to Earth. You explain. Save Earth!
Yes. Convert from Eridian prime-sequence electric amplitude to inefficient Earth direct-current system.
We have sampler. We leave now.
I fix things. My job is to repair broken things, create needed things, and keep engines running.
Now you do much testing. Venus air. Threeworld air.
Three hours. I watch engines. You relax.
Some life on Adrian EATS Astrophage! Population in balance. Natural order. This explains all things!
Good good, good good good, good.
Yes. No understand why Tau not sick but Eridani is sick. If Astrophage no leave Eridani, my people die.
How long was that stuff inside me, question?
Yes yes. I need these things.
Why you say ‘real food,’ question? What is non-real food, question?
Happy! Happy happy happy! Need to make nitrogen wash. Make sure no Taumoeba-82.5 get into Hail Mary.
Spool Twenty away. All spools released. Air density of sampler is almost Astrophage breeding ground level…
Thank. What are wavelengths of light humans can see, question?
Minimum is 12,265 seconds. Maximum is 42,928 seconds.
I know. I know. We’ll talk more about it later. I have to get home anyway. Adrian is going to sleep soon, so I have to be there to watch.
Yes yes. Understand. Things in tunnel is last things.
Good good. And thinking machine have information, question? Science information from Earth, question?
You ship has much science! Show me things in science room, question?
You equipment quiet now. My equipment still working.
You ship no can rotate with tunnel attached.
Original crew was twenty-three. Now is only me.
You have many items in ship you no use. Two beds in dormitory, for instance. Melt them, make blocks, make more molds.
Understand. I am here forty-six years.
Use third han—hmm. Get beetles. I make new screws.
Amaze. What about sound, question? You can hear sound.
These numbers you gave me. You are certain these are the times for me to turn around and the times for me to reach Erid, question? They are so soon. So fast.
That is what I said. Flash in ten seconds.
Why is mission like this, question?
Astrophage is alive. Maybe Astrophage can rot.
Machines break. Show me. I fix.
Hopeless. Cannot change Threeworld air. Cannot change Venus air. Cannot change Taumoeba. Hopeless.
Xenonite parts in bags in dormitory. Liquids. Mix. Become xenonite.
Yes! But first I make xenonite room for me. Mostly in sleep room. But tunnels in lab and small area in control room. Is okay, question?
But I won’t see you later.
Need know why star not die. Need plan.
Danger, question? Your ship accelerate at 15 meters per second per second. Will tanks hold, question?
Two hundred second thrust. Begin now.
Agree. I go to control room now. You go to storage locker and lie flat. Do not forget control panel with long extension cords.
Good good good, come inside with predator collector now.
Better question. Why we think same speed, question?
It is when person not act normal. Danger to self.
Very very unexpected. Nitrogen harmless to Erid life. Nitrogen required by many Erid life.
Thank! This is special clothing for celebration.
I bring much. I use to make my zone.
Not much gravity. Erid gravity is 20.48.
Is okay. If you did earlier I die. But I heal enough before you do it. Removing help a little. Thank.
John, Ringo, Paul off. Velocity is orbital.
No say sorry. You save me when you put me here. Thank thank thank. I am weak. I will heal.
You seal sample and can no access sample, question?
How do you know when the hug is done?
Yes. Very Eridian. Hurry and get sample.
I speed up. Slow down. Much confuse. But get here. Even with all mistakes and confusion, I get here in three years. Half of time science Eridian say should be. So much confuse.
I will heal. Attempted many things to stop Taumoeba infestation. All failed.
Everything! Human science better than Eridian science. Machine that think. Eridians no have that. Many machines there Eridians no have.
Sampler has closed! Seal is airtight, heater is on! Success success success!
Not understand. Why Earth so bad so fast, question? Erid go bad slower. Have at least seventy-two years before big problems.

Eridian body is closed. Only opening happen when eat or lay egg. After opening seals, area inside made very hot inside with hot blood for long time. Kill any disease. Disease can only get into body through wound. Then is very bad. Body shut down infected area. Heat with hot blood to kill disease. If disease fast, Eridian die.
Yes! And some on my ship too!
I’m not polite company, my friend!
So what we do now, question?
No. Wrong way, wrong way. Wrong angle, bad, bad, bad. Good, good, good!
Expected. Astrophage need carbon dioxide. Taumoeba from same ecology. Taumoeba also need carbon dioxide. How they get carbon dioxide in fuel tanks, question?
Yes. Have enough liquids remain to make 0.61 cubic meters.
Life is reason! Life is reason!
Oh. So we enjoy remaining time together, then go save planets. Then we are heroes!
Humans are amaze. You leave ship.
You leave tunnel. I make new divider wall. Bigger airlock.
This is waste of time. Also waste of my food.
Grumpy. Angry. Stupid. How long since last sleep, question?
It is name of my mate.
I also sleep alone many times. Sad sad sad.
No! You sleep. Human no function well after no sleep. EVA dangerous. Sleep first. EVA next.
Normally you can see surface of planet from space, question?
Game not over. I make chain. I make long chain. I put collection device on end.
We are much much smarter than animals.
How you operate centrifuge controls from storage room, question?
Good. Human light sense very useful.
I assume that is Earth idiom.
But Earth is almost same distance from Tau Ceti, and you will take four years, question?
Do not explain, please. You have findings, question?
Many seconds… Why be still so many seconds, question…Understand!
It analyze light and show as texture.
You mount on hull. Aim forty-five degrees out away from centerline of ship.
Amaze. I gave choices for different qualities of sound. Never thought of light.
Someday we find out why nitrogen was problem.

You ship has more science than my ship. Better science. I bring my things into you ship. Release tunnel. You make you ship spin for science. You and me science how to kill Astrophage together. Save Earth. Save Erid. This is good plan, question?
We work more. We no give up. We work hard. We are brave.
Hey, Grace. Do you ever wonder? About other life out there?
This is happy! Your face opening is in sad mode. Why, question?
Yes, sad. But necessary. Must save Erid. You pick human word for ♫♩♪♫.
Next flash is three minutes, seven seconds.
No, no no no no, Grace will die! Can repeat mission, can try again later.
Robot arms do things to you arm while you sleep.
You and me are good people
Hull bending in big room below dormitory
I sleep better if you observe.
Yes yes. Planet move around Tau. Astrophage go there from Tau. Same at Eridani. Astrophage make more Astrophage with carbon dioxide there.
Eridians not know how long sleep last. Maybe short time. Maybe long time.
Not much gravity. What is value, question?
Our scholars will solve. You just get me started.
You tell me this before. But they use same fuel, correct? Astrophage all dead now.
Was easy. Put in metal balls with carbon dioxide. Put in ocean. Wait. Astrophage double, double, double. Much Astrophage.
Not know. Many things break. My people make ship very hurry. No time to make sure all things work good.
No. Gravity help heal. Sample container is safe, question?
Fuel tanks next to Rocky workshop, there.
What, question?! Why you no tell me this, question?

Hello Earth! Plan is like fishing. We get very close to Adrian atmosphere, and lower collector into clouds with chain, then Grace go on hull to reel it in. If ship not at precise angle and speed, we die! Example!
Control these from outside. Gather sample. Seal you device. Open my device. Have sample. Do human science with sample.
I can see it make small thing, question?
Noise is from all around, is loudest [echoing] at portside of bedroom!
I try so many times. Fail so many times. Not good at science.
My mass is one hundred sixty-eight kilograms
You star is what name, question?
Don’t need xenonite. Any strong material will do. Have much metal aboard my ship. Melt, shape, make tank for you.
Math is not thinking. Math is procedure. Memory is not thinking. Memory is storage. Thinking is thinking. Problem, solution. You and me think same speed. Why, question?
Yeah, I thought so. Just checking. Is this a fist-bump situation?
Good plan. Do not forget to purge fuel lines.
Understand! Make environment barely deadly. Breed Taumoeba that survive. Make more deadly. Breed survivors. Repeat, repeat, repeat!
Yes. Thank you for laptop. Centuries of human technology all for our scientists to learn about. You have given greatest gift in history of my people.
Beetles have much fuel remaining. Is okay. Tell me angle change.
Easy. Astrophage here. Astrophage take all heat hotter than ninety-six degrees.
Grace, if we bring predator home, our stars not die.
Understand. Eridian name for you star is ♫♪♫♪♩♩.
I tried to make replacement. Failed. Tried. Failed. Tried. Failed. I put ship in path of Astrophage. Maybe some get stuck on hull. But robot on hull no can find any. Astrophage very small.
But Grace won’t feel comfortable and safe.
Science Eridians do much math. Calculate trip. More fuel mean faster trip. So we make much much much Astrophage.
How, question? How can you hear light, question?
How Taumoeba in bad two bays survive, question?
I bring materials to make xenonite. Can make any shape.
Yeah. It really is something. Go do your job, old man.
Yes! I make! I make now!
You no want sunnier than this?
No understand. Cures for diseases in nature, question? How, question?
If ship not unspooled, force is too much for human.
It is time. We go save homeworlds now.
I not know. Everyone get sick. Then everyone die. I not sick. I not know why.
Three thousand meters per second. Standard acceleration rate is acceptable, question?
Four days. Could be five days. Why you ask, question?
No surprise. Is their native environment. But proves equipment works.

This is just one part of thinking-machine life-support system. System will give power, keep Earth temperature, Earth air inside. Many redundant backups. Make sure thinking machine not break. If break, no Eridian can fix.
Wait. You no can eat Erid life. You no have Earth life to eat. What about Adrian life, question?
Spool Twelve away… Sampler signal good. Sampler detecting air now.
Grace and Rocky big science. How to kill Astrophage together.
Then, most important: How long until orbit decays, question?
Astrophage on me star, bad bad bad bad bad bad bad bad.
Good! Bad, not enough, not enough. Too much, too much, too much!
Good good. Is sample ready, question?
Speaking from a selfish perspective, I hope you stay. But that’s just me.
Oh, you had to eat, right?
Yes. I have much Astrophage. My ship was more efficient than planned on trip here. You can have two million kilograms.
No one to watch you sleep.
You say is bad for you. We find out.
Slow down means orbit no good. Fall into air. Die.
Collector is closed, move winch into position!
Erid circles Eridani one time every 198.8 Eridian days. 198.8 Eridian days is year.
Finally! I’ve been waiting for ℓλ minutes! What took you so long?!
This is unfortunate. Eight point eight kilometers away from breeding zone. No can get closer, question?
You bad at this. I fix.
No. No mass in space. Space is empty.
Good. Same. You and me will save Eridani and Sol.
I am sad also. But we not be sad for long. You are scientist. I am engineer. Together we solve.
They damage generator, question? Give me generator. I fix.
No, it’s usually closer. On your chest.
Want to see human technology. Is allowed, question?
Worked, question?! What is Adrian air, question?
Is natural smell or chemical smell, question?
Yes! Your star has returned to full luminance!
Yes yes. I make now. We are team. We fix this. No be sad.
You make angry sound. Why, question?
Fail fail fail. I am repair Eridian. I not science Eridian. Smart smart smart science Eridians died.
No, not safe. Eridians must watch sleep.
Maybe temperature of bulb no good. Too hot. Adrian upper atmosphere is probably much colder than you room temperature.
Black substance is not soot. My body make this. It cover damage while body repairs.
No, is bad. Grace Rocky dead. All Rocky plural, all—
I have room in ship. Workshop.
Cell. My crew have problem with cells. Many many cells die. Not infection. Not injury. No reason. But not me. Never me. Why, question? I not know.
Get back in you ship! Unless you want to look at tunnel from outside!
Understand. Thank. I now know why I not die.
You have many portable thinking machines. I ask favor: You give one to me as gift, question?
Good good. Enough talk. Check breeder tanks, please.
I know mass of this ball. You measure. You tell me how many kilograms ball is. Then I know kilogram.
Adjust orbit while stupid. Good plan.
How close can orbit get, question?
You are not healthy! Undo this. We make new plan.
Was twenty-three Eridians on ship. Now only one.
But if Astrophage going to Adrian to breed, there should be more leaving.
Amaze is wrong word. Amaze is compliment. Better word is ♫♪♫♪.
More! No, no, no, left! Be left, more left, more left!
My Astrophage in sealed xenonite container. Is safe. You sleep now.
Good plan! You are smart! I can make these for you. Also, today I finish fuel-transfer device. Can give you Astrophage now. Then we both go home!
Life on Adrian is reason Astrophage imbalance. Life on Adrian makes Astrophage die!
I can give. I have extra. Can give that much and still have plenty for my return to Erid. You can have.
Beetles arranged for thrust, not rotation.
So will you go home now? Or will you stay?
No. My ship had device for this. But device broke.
What is name of you chair, question?
In back of ship near engines.
Everywhere. Tiny receptors on outer shell. All report back to brain. Like touch.
We must fly backwards to keep proper velocity, even though Grace still have no pilot experience.
What altitude is best, question? If you predator, where you go, question? You go to Astrophage.
I need word. Small life. Single thing. Like Astrophage. Eridian body made of many many of these.
Predators is only explanation. Maybe predators no live in Petrova line. Maybe predators live further down in atmosphere.
Engine damage, question? Much heat from Adrian.
—No understand, no understand! Grace, Grace, Grace!
Erid will live! Earth will live! Everyone live! Fist me!
You knew this when you left Earth, question?
How much Astrophage you need, question?
Yes, think about it long time.
Life! Life is reason! Life is reason!
Eridian scientists are ready.to prepare Hail Mary for journey home.
Eat Erid food. We evolve from same life. We use same proteins. Same chemicals. Same sugars. Must work!
I thought you made peace, question?
Abort, abort, abort! Grace will die! No no no no no no no no!
If all plans work, we make good Taumoeba. I give you fuel. You go Earth and I go Erid. We say goodbye.
Engines give off enormous IR light. If you use in air, air become ions. Explosion. Destroy ship.
Taumoeba eat all your fuel. Therefore Taumoeba survive and breed in fuel-tank environment.
Thank. Now I know how my friends died.
Need model to make plan. Grace question is dumb.
You are… You… You are here!
I not understand science. I just use. Apology.
Seven thousand seven hundred and seventy-six seconds is day. Erid rotate one circle in one day.
Enough to get us to my ship! Good news! Good good good!
Yes. Earth oceans are not. Sad.
Yaw plus one three mark seven two. Pitch minus nine mark one four.
No no no. Use planet gravity to move with line.
If predators exist, predators are there.
Grace, the door. Close the door.
Strange things happen on trip. Crew sick. Die. Now I know was radiation.
I am here forty-six Earth years, yes.
No. You no can die. You are friend.
Yes. The data was analyzed by a thrum of λV astronomers. It checks out.
Yes yes. I name this color: middle-rough. My display pattern is smooth for high-frequency light. Rough for low-frequency light. This color is middle-rough.
You want xenonite patch for hole now, question?
I not have word for this.
Why did I not die, question?

Then more strange: Reach halfway point earlier than should. Much earlier. I turn ship around. Thrust to slow down. But Tau get farther away. How? Still moving toward Tau but Tau moving away. Much confusion.
Move hand toward your feet and left…
You are bravest human I have ever met.
Skin on arm is not smooth. Damage, question?
Camera inside convert from Earth light readout to Eridian texture readout. Like camera in control room. Before we leave, you explain written language to me.
Is okay. Grace find out when Grace go home.
You…you no can die. I no let you die. We send you home. Erid will be grateful. You save everyone. We do everything to save you.
Much much much fuel remain. Much more than should have. No complain. But confuse.
I stay here. Tell me how experiments go.
Wait. How much Astrophage you ship need for return to Earth, question?
Who is Grace talking to, question?
Why does ship have name but chair no have name, question?
You will miss me, question? I will miss you. You are friend.
I…I don’t know. Maybe I can.
No. Not fail. Thrust normal. But speed…not increase. No can explain.
No. Camera is old technology. Display is old technology. Both were on my ship for science. I only modify to use inside.
Interesting theory. But Erid have double Earth gravity. You and I same intelligence.
Happy happy happy! Now you name.
Rotation rate is zero. Beetles hard to control. Correction: Beetles easy to control. Ship powered by beetles hard to control.
Thank. You leave now. I make large airlock for tunnel.
Be careful. You are friend now.
Yeah, I know. That’s why I wanted to be the one to tell you.
Many many containers of Astrophage. All in back of ship. Close to engines. Easy to refuel.
Rocky want to see human technology.
Human eyes are amazing organ. Jealous.
How long since last sleep, question?
You have explained before, but again…why, question?
Would take long time to explain.
How I detach tunnel, question? Me inside ball.
Can hear. Who are you talking to?
Science Eridians design ship and fuel requirements. Journey to take 6.64 years.
You will give that liquid to the Taumoeba, question?
Useful trait. Both evolve. Not surprising.
No. This make hot air into cold air
No. Why would I have light, question?
Usually you not stupid. Why stupid, question?
Why so fast, question? Slower is safer. Less mistakes.
Much more heal needed. But some heal complete. Cannot move much.
Astrophage on me star. Bad bad bad.
Why humans need water so much, question? Inefficient life-forms!
Good! You inspect with science gear, question?
Science, save Earth, save Erid. Good plan.
After collection, how sample enter ship, question?
Ah! Disease evolves defense against chemical that kills it.
We take home! It eat Astrophage, breed, eat more Astrophage, breed, eat more more more! Stars saved!
Room and device keep me alive in you ship.
We keep inside. Closed system. Some inefficiencies inside, but we get all water we need from food. Humans leak! Gross.
Amaze. I give you many choices for wall when first build. You choose this because light pass through, question?
Taumoeba-35! Took many many generations but finally success!
Too fast, do puppet show, too fast.
Fist my bump? No. It’s fist bump.
You tell when to release probe
